name: Karen's Fried Rainbow Trout
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon crushed lemon thyme or lemon verbena
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the flour, corn meal, onion powder, garlic powder, crushed lemon thyme or lemon verbena, salt, and paprika.
2. Reserve 1/2 cup of this mixture in another bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg and add milk. Mix well.
4. Wash and lightly dry the rainbow trout fillets.
5. Dip each fillet first in the flour mixture, then in the egg and milk mixture, and finally roll in the remaining flour and corn meal mixture.
6. Place the coated fish on wax paper. Repeat until all pieces are coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
7. Fry the fish in hot oil until golden brown and cooked through, turning once.
